name: Dyno Bot
description: Feature-rich Discord bot for moderation, auto-roles, announcements, and server management with a web dashboard.

name: Hoe Panel
description: Self-hosted game server management panel. Start, stop, reinstall, and configure your game servers through a clean web UI.

name: Maki Bot
description: All-in-one Discord bot with moderation, XP levelling, welcome messages, reaction roles, and custom commands. Managed via web dashboard.

name: TicketTool
description: Discord ticket bot for running support queues on your server. Set up ticket channels, auto-responses, and claim systems from the dashboard.
